description.en: Indicates what kind of change triggered theDOMAttrModifiedevent. It can beMODIFICATION(1),ADDITION(2) orREMOVAL(3). It has no meaning for other events and is then set to0.

description.en: Indicates the name of the node affected by theDOMAttrModifiedevent. It has no meaning for other events and is then set to the empty string ("").
